title: CMS announces pause on new durable medical equipment suppliers
description: The Trump administration issued a nationwide moratorium on new suppliers for certain medical equipment, citing fraud.
content: The Trump administration issued a nationwide moratorium on new suppliers for certain medical equipment, citing fraud.
